title: sesbania sesban var. bicolor
intro: Sesbania sesban var. bicolor, also known as the Forest Bean or Bicolor Sesban, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia and Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The health benefits of Sesbania sesban var. bicolor include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling its leaves and roots in water to create a herbal remedy for various health issues.
